title: Do galaxy mergers increase star formation and turbulence at cosmic noon?
comment: 15 pages, 12 figures, 2 tables, submitted to MNRAS
summary: Mergers and interactions can significantly affect the morphological and dynamical properties of galaxies, however the impact of mergers on turbulence at $z > 1$ has not been observationally constrained. In this work we use the interaction strength parameter $Q_P$ to identify likely interacting and isolated galaxies at cosmic noon ($z \sim 1-2$) within the KMOS\textsuperscript{3D} integral field spectroscopy survey, utilising redshifts from the 3D-HST, CANDELS and UVCANDELS surveys. For $186$ galaxies, we measure deconvolved H$α$ kinematics, including velocity dispersion, using a spatially non-parametric approach to account for observational effects in the dynamically diverse range of galaxies. We compare offsets in H$α$ flux, star formation rate (SFR), dust attenuations, and velocity dispersion of likely interacting galaxies to isolated control galaxies matched in mass and lookback time. We find increased H$α$ fluxes and SFRs in the likely interacting sample at the level of $\sim 0.1$ dex, a similar enhancement to studies of local pairs. In contrast, we find no significant increase in the level of velocity dispersion in interacting galaxies compared to their controls. The lack of increase in dispersion may reflect a combination of physical and observational factors, including limits to increasing turbulent motions in an already turbulent medium and spectral resolution limits.

AI.tldr: 研究发现在宇宙正午时期（z~1-2），星系相互作用会增强Hα通量和恒星形成率约0.1 dex，但不会显著增加速度弥散度（湍流水平）。
AI.motivation: 星系合并和相互作用会显著影响星系的形态和动力学特性，但在z>1时期，相互作用对湍流的影响尚未得到观测约束。本研究旨在探索宇宙正午时期星系相互作用对湍流的影响。
AI.method: 使用相互作用强度参数Q_P在KMOS^3D积分场光谱巡天中识别可能的相互作用星系和孤立星系（z~1-2），利用3D-HST、CANDELS和UVCANDELS巡天的红移数据。对186个星系采用空间非参数方法测量去卷积的Hα运动学参数（包括速度弥散度），以考虑观测效应。将相互作用星系与质量和回溯时间匹配的孤立对照星系进行比较。
AI.result: 相互作用星系显示出Hα通量和恒星形成率增加约0.1 dex，与本地星系对研究结果相似。然而，与对照星系相比，相互作用星系的速度弥散度没有显著增加。
AI.conclusion: 星系相互作用在宇宙正午时期会增强恒星形成活动，但不会显著增加湍流水平。速度弥散度缺乏增加可能反映了物理和观测因素的综合影响，包括在已经湍流的介质中增加湍流运动的限制以及光谱分辨率的限制。

recommendation.reason: 该论文直接研究宇宙正午（z~1-2）的星系相互作用对恒星形成和湍流的影响，与用户Zotero画像中高权重的'cosmic noon'、'star formation rate'、'dust'、'velocity dispersion'等主题高度匹配。论文使用KMOS^3D积分场光谱数据，与用户核心作者群（Natascha M. Förster Schreiber等）的研究方向一致，且方法涉及运动学分析，与用户关注的星系动力学和强引力透镜研究有方法上的关联。虽然论文未直接涉及强引力透镜，但其科学问题（高红移星系动力学和恒星形成）与用户的核心兴趣高度契合，因此给予四星评分。
recommendation.topic_fit: 高。论文主题'cosmic noon'、'star formation'、'turbulence'与用户画像中的'cosmic noon'、'star formation rate'、'velocity dispersion'等关键词高度重叠。
recommendation.method_fit: 中高。使用KMOS^3D积分场光谱数据测量Hα运动学，与用户核心作者常用的观测手段一致，且方法涉及空间非参数分析，与用户关注的星系动力学研究有方法上的关联。
recommendation.author_fit: 高。作者中包含用户核心作者Natascha M. Förster Schreiber，且其他作者（如E. Wisnioski）也与用户画像中的合作网络相关。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。该研究首次在z>1时期观测约束相互作用对湍流的影响，具有一定新颖性，但结论与本地研究相似，创新性有限。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文未直接涉及强引力透镜，但科学问题与用户核心兴趣高度相关，因此不构成降分理由。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 并合与相互作用会显著影响星系的形态和动力学性质，然而在红移$z > 1$处，并合对湍流的影响尚未得到观测上的约束。本研究利用KMOS\textsuperscript{3D}积分场光谱巡天中的相互作用强度参数$Q_P$，识别宇宙正午时期（$z \sim 1-2$）的可能相互作用星系和孤立星系，并采用3D-HST、CANDELS和UVCANDELS巡天的红移数据。对于$186$个星系，我们测量了去卷积的H$α$运动学（包括速度弥散度），采用空间非参数方法以考虑动力学多样星系中的观测效应。我们将可能相互作用星系与质量回溯时间匹配的孤立对照星系在H$α$流量、恒星形成率（SFR）、尘埃消光以及速度弥散度上的偏移进行比较。我们发现可能相互作用样本的H$α$流量和SFR增加了约$\sim 0.1$ dex，这与本地对星系研究中的增强程度相似。相比之下，我们发现相互作用星系的速度弥散度相比对照星系没有显著增加。弥散度缺乏增加可能反映了物理和观测因素的综合影响，包括在已经湍流的介质中增加湍流运动的限制以及光谱分辨率的限制。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，星系相互作用在宇宙正午时期会增强恒星形成活动，但不会显著增加湍流水平。速度弥散度缺乏增加可能反映了物理和观测因素的综合影响，包括在已经湍流的介质中增加湍流运动的限制以及光谱分辨率的限制。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The 3D-HST parent sample, with updated redshift information and quality cuts applied (small grey points), overplotted with the full KMOS 3D sample (large grey circles), the KMOS 3D sample with quality cuts applied as described in Section 2.3 (large black circles), and the final kinematic sample described in Section 3.5 (large open circles). The solid line describes the fit to the \(90\) percent mass completeness limit of the sample. The dashed line is the \(4\) : \(1\) merger mass limit.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：3D-HST母样本（小灰点，已应用更新后的红移信息和质量筛选），叠加了完整的KMOS 3D样本（大灰圆）、经过第2.3节所述质量筛选的KMOS 3D样本（大黑圆）以及第3.5节所述的最终运动学样本（大空心圆）。实线描述了样本的\(90\)%质量完备极限的拟合。虚线是\(4\) : \(1\)并合质量极限。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: A comparison of \(Q_{P}\) and \(r_{Q_{P}}\) for all galaxies in the spectroscopic redshift sample, coloured by the effective radius of each galaxy. The colourbar spans the \(1-99\) th percentile of the galaxy effective radii. Closed black circles denote KMOS 3D galaxies which pass the quality cuts given in Section 2.3 and open circles show the final kinematic sample described in Section 3.5 . Vertical lines denote the control \(Q_{P}=50\) th percentile limit (solid vertical line) and \(Q_{P}=90\) th percentile likely interacting limit (dashed vertical line). The projected separation pair limit of Ellison et al. ( 2008 ) is included as a horizontal line.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：光谱红移样本中所有星系的\(Q_{P}\)与\(r_{Q_{P}}\)比较，颜色表示每个星系的有效半径。色标跨越星系有效半径的\(1-99\)百分位数。闭合黑圆表示通过第2.3节质量筛选的KMOS 3D星系，空心圆表示第3.5节所述的最终运动学样本。竖线表示对照\(Q_{P}=50\)百分位数极限（实竖线）和\(Q_{P}=90\)百分位数可能相互作用极限（虚竖线）。Ellison等人（2008）的投影分离对极限以水平线表示。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: The parameters used to apply ROHSA-SNAPD to the KMOS 3D galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于对KMOS 3D星系应用ROHSA-SNAPD的参数。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: The final size of the kinematic control and likely interacting samples, for fits with different \(\lambda_{\mu}\) values. Values in brackets in each cell show the number of galaxies which meet the well-resolved criteria discussed in Section 3.5 .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：对于不同\(\lambda_{\mu}\)值的拟合，运动学对照样本和可能相互作用样本的最终大小。每个单元格括号中的数值表示满足第3.5节所述良好分辨准则的星系数量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: This figure shows the galaxy U4_34173 . The left-most panel shows the galaxy in a 3-colour JWST image (f090w, f115w, f150w), with the KMOS field of view overplotted as a box. The remaining panels show the results of the ROHSA-SNAPD modelling, where each map is the median fit from \(100\) noise resamples. As the KMOS 3D cubes were cropped to remove noisy edge pixels, as discussed in Section 3.2 , we pad the edges of the maps to the KMOS field of view for clear comparison with the JWST imaging. The top row shows deconvolved flux, LOS velocity and velocity dispersion. The bottom row shows convolved flux, LOS velocity and dispersion. Deconvolved and convolved kinematic maps shows pixels with S/N \(>1\) , calculated using deconvolved and convolved flux maps respectively, as discussed in Section 4 . The FWHM ellipse of the observed PSF is included on the kinematic maps in the bottom row. The colourbar bounds for the deconvolved and convolved ROHSA-SNAPD kinematic maps are calculated separately using non-masked spaxels, and the observed maps use the same bounds as the convolved. The flux map colourbar spans the \(10\) to \(90\) th percentiles. The line-of-sight velocity map is set to \(\pm\) the \(10\) to \(90\) th percentile, whichever has the largest magnitude. All line-of-sight velocity maps are centred around \(v_{{max}}+v_{{min}}/2\) of the deconvolved map. The deconvolved velocity dispersion is a single value for the full map, so the colourbar is centred on this value, and is also listed in the top right corner of the panel. The convolved and observed velocity dispersion colourbars span the \(10\) to \(90\) th percentiles of the convolved map.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：此图显示星系U4_34173。最左侧面板显示该星系在3色JWST图像（f090w, f115w, f150w）中的情况，KMOS视场以方框叠加。其余面板显示ROHSA-SNAPD建模的结果，每张图是来自\(100\)次噪声重采样的中值拟合。由于KMOS 3D立方体被裁剪以去除噪声边缘像素（如第3.2节所述），我们将图边缘填充至KMOS视场以便与JWST图像清晰比较。顶行显示去卷积的流量、视线速度（LOS velocity）和速度弥散度。底行显示卷积后的流量、视线速度和弥散度。去卷积和卷积的运动学图显示信噪比\(>1\)的像素，分别使用去卷积和卷积流量图计算，如第4节所述。观测PSF的半高全宽（FWHM）椭圆包含在底行的运动学图中。去卷积和卷积的ROHSA-SNAPD运动学图的色标范围分别使用非掩蔽空间像素计算，观测图使用与卷积图相同的范围。流量图色标跨越\(10\)至\(90\)百分位数。视线速度图设定为\(\pm\) \(10\)至\(90\)百分位数中绝对值最大的值。所有视线速度图以去卷积图的\(v_{{max}}+v_{{min}}/2\)为中心。去卷积速度弥散度是全图的一个单一值，因此色标以此值为中心，并在面板右上角列出。卷积和观测速度弥散度色标跨越卷积图的\(10\)至\(90\)百分位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: A comparison of interaction strength \(Q_{P}\) with the jackknifed \(\Delta\log\) offset in galaxy H \(\alpha\) flux. Symbols denote the velocity regularisation value, \(\lambda_{\mu}\) , used in the fit. Vertical solid and dashed lines show the control and likely interacting \(Q_{P}\) bounds respectively. Small offsets in \(Q_{P}\) are applied to the different \(\lambda_{\mu}\) results for visual clarity.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：相互作用强度\(Q_{P}\)与星系H \(\alpha\)流量的刀切法\(\Delta\log\)偏移的比较。符号表示拟合中使用的速度正则化值\(\lambda_{\mu}\)。垂直实线和虚线分别表示对照和可能相互作用的\(Q_{P}\)边界。为清晰起见，对不同\(\lambda_{\mu}\)结果施加了小的\(Q_{P}\)偏移。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The \(\Delta{A}_{v}\) offset from the control for both the kinematic sample (closed points) and the high-quality star-forming 3D-HST spectroscopic sample (open points). The layout of the figure is similar to Figure 4 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：运动学样本（闭合点）和高质量恒星形成3D-HST光谱样本（空心点）相对于对照的\(\Delta{A}_{v}\)偏移。图布局与图4类似。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The two panels compare interaction strength with the \(\Delta\log\) offset from the control of galaxy H \(\alpha\) SFR (left panel) and deconvolved velocity dispersion (right panel). The velocity dispersion offsets are calculated using only well-resolved galaxies, as described in Section 3.5 . The layout of each panel is similar to Figure 4 .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：两个面板比较了相互作用强度与星系H \(\alpha\) SFR（左面板）和去卷积速度弥散度（右面板）相对于对照的\(\Delta\log\)偏移。速度弥散度偏移仅使用良好分辨的星系计算，如第3.5节所述。每个面板的布局与图4类似。

title: The GECKOS survey: Resolving the molecular and ionised gas in the galactic outflow of ESO~484-036
comment: 20 pages, 11 main + 2 appendix figures, Submitted to MNRAS
summary: We present a spatially resolved, multiphase study of the outflow in the edge-on starburst galaxy ESO~484-036 from the GECKOS survey, combining VLT/MUSE H$α$ and ALMA CO(1$-$0) observations to analyse the atomic ionised and cold molecular gas. Both show extraplanar emission consistent with a conical outflow. Ionised gas is enclosed by molecular gas, which is detected up to 2.5 kpc from the disc. Molecular gas dominates near the disc, except at the nuclear base, while ionised gas extends beyond 3 kpc. The deprojected outflow velocities are $\lesssim400\ \rm km\ s^{-1}$ in both phases and are consistent with ballistic motion, with some gas possibly falling back onto the disc. We find that the mass outflow rates are in the range of $\dot M_{\rm ion}\sim1-5\ \rm M_\odot\ \rm yr^{-1}$ and $\dot M_{\rm mol}\sim13-54\ \rm M_\odot\ \rm yr^{-1}$, giving mass loading factors of $η_{M\rm, ion}\sim 0.1-0.6$ and $η_{M\rm, mol}\sim 1.5-6.2$. These ranges reflect velocity and geometric uncertainties. Despite the short depletion time ($τ_{\rm dep} = 16-48\rm\ Myr$), the outflow may regulate rather than permanently quench the gas reservoir. Energy loading ($η_E\leq0.16$) and momentum loading ($η_p\lesssim1$) support a purely starburst-driven outflow. Comparing ESO~484-036 with a literature sample, we find a systematic 1~dex shift in mass-loading relations when molecular gas is included. This produces a $\sim3.5$~dex discrepancy with cosmological simulations in $η_{M\rm, mol}/η_{M\rm, ion}$, implying that current models strongly underpredict cold gas production and the role of short-range recycling flows in starburst galaxies.

AI.tldr: 对ESO~484-036星暴星系的流出进行空间分辨多相研究，发现分子气体主导近盘区流出，电离气体延伸更远，流出由星暴驱动而非AGN，分子气体质量流出率比电离气体高约1个数量级，与现有模拟存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 研究星暴星系中多相气体流出的空间分布、动力学特性和驱动机制，特别是分子气体在流出中的作用，以理解流出对星系演化的影响，并检验现有宇宙学模拟的准确性。
AI.method: 结合VLT/MUSE Hα观测分析原子电离气体，以及ALMA CO(1-0)观测分析冷分子气体，对边缘星暴星系ESO~484-036进行空间分辨的多相流出研究，测量速度、质量流出率、质量负载因子等参数。
AI.result: 发现电离气体被分子气体包围，分子气体探测到距盘2.5 kpc，电离气体延伸超过3 kpc；去投影流出速度约400 km/s，符合弹道运动；质量流出率：电离气体1-5 M⊙/yr，分子气体13-54 M⊙/yr；质量负载因子：电离气体0.1-0.6，分子气体1.5-6.2；能量负载≤0.16，动量负载≲1，支持纯星暴驱动流出。
AI.conclusion: 流出可能调节而非永久耗尽气体储备；包含分子气体时质量负载关系出现系统性1 dex偏移，与宇宙学模拟存在约3.5 dex差异，表明当前模型严重低估了星暴星系中冷气体产生和短程循环流的作用。

recommendation.reason: 论文聚焦于星暴星系ESO~484-036的多相气体流出，涉及分子气体（ALMA CO）和电离气体（MUSE Hα），与用户兴趣画像中的molecular、starburst galaxies、cold gas、ALMA等关键词高度匹配。但论文不涉及强引力透镜，且未使用用户核心作者，因此评分中等偏上。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题为星暴星系的多相气体流出，与用户兴趣中的molecular、starburst galaxies、cold gas、ALMA等关键词高度匹配，但未涉及强引力透镜或高红移星系动力学，属于部分匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 使用ALMA CO(1-0)和VLT MUSE Hα进行空间分辨观测，与用户兴趣中的ALMA、molecular gas emission等方法匹配，但未涉及引力透镜方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 论文作者列表中包含R. L. Davies，与用户核心作者列表中的ric davies匹配，但其他作者如D. B. Fisher、M. Martig等不在用户核心作者中，整体作者匹配度较低。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文揭示了分子气体在流出中的主导作用，并与宇宙学模拟存在显著差异，具有较高的新颖性，但未涉及用户特别关注的高红移星系或引力透镜。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文不涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或高红移偏振等用户优先主题，且未使用用户核心作者群体。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了GECKOS巡天中对边缘星暴星系ESO~484-036中流出活动的空间分辨多相研究，结合VLT/MUSE的Hα和ALMA的CO(1−0)观测，分析了原子电离气体和冷分子气体。两者均显示出与锥形流出一致的盘外发射。电离气体被分子气体包围，分子气体在距盘面2.5 kpc处仍可探测到。分子气体在盘面附近占主导，但核区底部除外，而电离气体延伸至3 kpc以上。两相的去投影流出速度均≲400 km s⁻¹，与弹道运动一致，部分气体可能落回盘面。我们发现质量流出率范围为Ṁ_ion∼1−5 M⊙ yr⁻¹和Ṁ_mol∼13−54 M⊙ yr⁻¹，对应的质量加载因子为η_M,ion∼0.1−0.6和η_M,mol∼1.5−6.2。这些范围反映了速度和几何不确定性。尽管耗尽时间很短（τ_dep = 16−48 Myr），流出可能调节而非永久耗尽气体储备。能量加载（η_E≤0.16）和动量加载（η_p≲1）支持纯星暴驱动的流出。将ESO~484-036与文献样本比较，我们发现当包含分子气体时，质量加载关系出现系统性1 dex偏移。这导致η_M,mol/η_M,ion与宇宙学模拟存在约3.5 dex的差异，表明当前模型严重低估了星暴星系中冷气体的产生和短程循环流的作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：流出可能调节而非永久耗尽气体储备；包含分子气体时质量加载关系出现系统性1 dex偏移，与宇宙学模拟存在约3.5 dex差异，表明当前模型严重低估了星暴星系中冷气体产生和短程循环流的作用。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: ESO 484-036 starlight image showcasing the multiphase outflow structure. All panels show starlight in log scale. Top Left: \(55^{\prime\prime}\times 55^{\prime\prime}\) JWST F200W image with a different stretch to show the complete extent of the starlight disc. Half-light radius ( \(R_{e}=4.2\ kpc\) ) is shown in white. Outflow (red/blue) and disc (magenta) regions are presented. Remaining three panels focus on the central region showed in the grey square ( \(30^{\prime\prime}\times 30^{\prime\prime}\) ), displaying a JWST composite image (color-inverted) combining F430M (red), F200W (green), and F150W (blue). Top Right: Shows the galactic disc; the magenta rectangle is defined to avoid this disc region for outflow calculations. Bottom Left: Shows ALMA CO(1 \(-\) 0) contours (S/N \(=3.5\) ), with the blue rectangle defining the outflow region. Bottom Right: Shows VLT/MUSE H \(\alpha\) contours (S/N \(=5\) , used for science), where the red rectangle defines the outflow region. The golden star marks the galactic centre (used for major/minor axes definition). Both CO and H \(\alpha\) contours show extraplanar gas, a clear probe for the presence of a multiphase outflow. Bottom right panel also displays the cross-like structure described by Veilleux et al. ( 2003 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：ESO 484-036星光图像，展示了多相流出结构。所有面板均以对数尺度显示星光。左上：\(55^{\prime\prime}\times 55^{\prime\prime}\) JWST F200W图像，采用不同拉伸以显示星光盘的完整范围。半光半径（\(R_{e}=4.2\ kpc\)）以白色显示。流出区域（红色/蓝色）和盘区域（品红色）已标出。其余三个面板聚焦于灰色正方形（\(30^{\prime\prime}\times 30^{\prime\prime}\)）所示的中心区域，显示JWST合成图像（颜色反转），结合了F430M（红色）、F200W（绿色）和F150W（蓝色）。右上：显示星系盘；品红色矩形定义为避免该盘区域用于流出计算。左下：显示ALMA CO(1 \(-\) 0)等值线（信噪比\(=3.5\)），蓝色矩形定义流出区域。右下：显示VLT/MUSE H \(\alpha\)等值线（信噪比\(=5\)，用于科学分析），红色矩形定义流出区域。金色星标表示星系中心（用于定义主轴/次轴）。CO和H \(\alpha\)等值线均显示盘外气体，这是多相流出存在的明确证据。右下面板还显示了Veilleux等人（2003）描述的十字形结构。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Vertical, normalized intensity profiles for CO (blue), H \(\alpha\) (red), and starlight (F430M, magenta). The CO and H \(\alpha\) profiles differ clearly from that of the starlight, consistent with extraplanar emission. Grey band is the disc region. Spatial resolutions of ALMA ( \(1.16^{\prime\prime}\sim 390\ pc\) ) and MUSE ( \(0.8^{\prime\prime}\sim 270\ pc\) ) are showed as black bars for comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：CO（蓝色）、H \(\alpha\)（红色）和星光（F430M，品红色）的垂直归一化强度分布。CO和H \(\alpha\)分布与星光分布明显不同，与盘外发射一致。灰色带为盘区域。ALMA（\(1.16^{\prime\prime}\sim 390\ pc\)）和MUSE（\(0.8^{\prime\prime}\sim 270\ pc\)）的空间分辨率以黑色条显示以供比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: CO(1 \(-\) 0) moment maps of ESO 484-036, created from the ALMA data cube with a \(S/N=5\) threshold. Top: Intensity (moment 0) shows strong gas emission in the south, with a small decrement near the minor axis; the north lacks clear structure. A starlight (F200W) contour is overlaid. Middle: Line-of-sight velocity ( \(\upsilon_{LOS}\) , moment 1) indicates a wind preserving some disc rotation. Velocities are shown in the systemic rest frame of the galaxy. Bottom: Velocity dispersion ( \(\sigma\) , moment 2) shows a southern V-structure, consistent with outflow kinematics. CO contours are overlaid in both centre and bottom panels.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：ESO 484-036的CO(1 \(-\) 0)矩图，由ALMA数据立方体以信噪比\(=5\)阈值生成。上：强度（矩0）显示南部强气体发射，近次轴处略有减小；北部缺乏清晰结构。叠加了星光（F200W）等值线。中：视线速度（\(\upsilon_{LOS}\)，矩1）表明风保留了部分盘旋转。速度以星系系统静止参考系显示。下：速度弥散（\(\sigma\)，矩2）显示南部V形结构，与流出运动学一致。中、下面板均叠加了CO等值线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: H \(\alpha\) flux and kinematics maps of ESO 484-036 created from the VLT/MUSE data using a \(S/N=5\) threshold. Top: Flux map displays a prominent biconical extraplanar emission extending more than \(\sim 3\) kpc to each side. A starlight (F200W) contour is overlaid. Middle: Line-of-sight velocity ( \(\upsilon_{LOS}\) ) map indicates that the extraplanar emission preserves a component of the underlying disc rotation. Offsets from the midplane and expected zero-velocity in the centre can be attributed to the high obscuration. Velocities are shown in the systemic rest frame of the galaxy. Bottom: Velocity dispersion ( \(\sigma\) ) map corrected for instrumental broadening. The colorbar is capped at \(160\ km\ s^{-1}\) to highlight the high-dispersion biconical structure, consistent with outflow kinematics and similar to the top panel. \(H\alpha\) flux contours are overlaid in both centre and bottom panels.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：ESO 484-036的H \(\alpha\)流量和运动学图，由VLT/MUSE数据以信噪比\(=5\)阈值生成。上：流量图显示显著的双锥形盘外发射，每侧延伸超过\(\sim 3\) kpc。叠加了星光（F200W）等值线。中：视线速度（\(\upsilon_{LOS}\)）图表明盘外发射保留了部分底层盘旋转。偏离中平面和中心预期零速度可归因于高消光。速度以星系系统静止参考系显示。下：经仪器展宽校正的速度弥散（\(\sigma\)）图。色标上限设为\(160\ km\ s^{-1}\)以突出高弥散双锥结构，与流出运动学一致，且与上图相似。中、下面板均叠加了\(H\alpha\)流量等值线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Horizontal, normalised profiles for CO (blue) and H \(\alpha\) (red) maps for the south outflow at different heights; \(z=0.5-1\ kpc\) (bottom) and \(z=1-2\ kpc\) (top). Near the disc midplane ( \(z 1\) kpc), both profiles broaden, reflecting the biconical outflow expansion. Profiles are normalised to their local maxima to emphasise the spatial anti-correlation between the ionised and molecular phases.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：南部流出在不同高度处的CO（蓝色）和H \(\alpha\)（红色）图水平归一化分布；\(z=0.5-1\ kpc\)（下）和\(z=1-2\ kpc\)（上）。靠近盘面中平面（\(z 1\) kpc），两种分布均展宽，反映了双锥形流出膨胀。分布归一化至其局部最大值，以强调电离相和分子相之间的空间反相关。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Top: Outflow geometry determined using the method from McPherson et al. ( 2023 ) , overlaid on a rotated H \(\alpha\) flux map. Using the minor-axis as a centre, the outflow region is determined by \(50\%\) ( \(w_{50}\) , black dashed line) and \(80\%\) ( \(w_{80}\) , black solid line) widths of the flux. Bottom: Half-aperture angle ( \(\theta\) ) calculated for this geometry against distance from midplane. \(\theta\) is in the range of \(22^{\circ}-40^{\circ}\) , represented by the red dashed and solid lines of convergence for each contour, respectively. Grey band in both panels is the disc region.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：上：使用McPherson等人（2023）方法确定的流出几何，叠加在旋转后的H \(\alpha\)流量图上。以次轴为中心，流出区域由流量宽度的\(50\%\)（\(w_{50}\)，黑色虚线）和\(80\%\)（\(w_{80}\)，黑色实线）确定。下：针对该几何计算的半开角（\(\theta\)）与距中平面距离的关系。\(\theta\)范围为\(22^{\circ}-40^{\circ}\)，分别由红色虚线和实线表示各等值线的收敛。两个面板中的灰色带为盘区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Outflow geometry derived from the H \(\alpha\) flux map (Fig. 6 ) plotted on top of CO intensity (moment 0, left), CO velocity dispersion ( \(\sigma_{CO}\) , middle) and H \(\alpha\) velocity dispersion ( \(\sigma_{H\alpha}\) , right). Molecular gas clouds in the south outflow mostly reside in between the \(w_{50}\) and \(w_{80}\) widths, with the local minimum of CO (see Fig. 5 , bottom panel) residing in the inner cone. Peak \(\sigma_{CO}\) align with the \(w_{50}\) width. Peak \(\sigma_{H\alpha}\) describes a kinematic structure that is completely enclosed by the \(w_{50}\) width.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：由H \(\alpha\)流量图（图6）导出的流出几何，叠加在CO强度（矩0，左）、CO速度弥散（\(\sigma_{CO}\)，中）和H \(\alpha\)速度弥散（\(\sigma_{H\alpha}\)，右）上。南部流出中的分子气体云主要位于\(w_{50}\)和\(w_{80}\)宽度之间，CO局部最小值（见图5，下方面板）位于内锥中。\(\sigma_{CO}\)峰值与\(w_{50}\)宽度对齐。\(\sigma_{H\alpha}\)峰值描述了一个完全被\(w_{50}\)宽度包围的运动学结构。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Velocity profiles for the molecular (blue) and ionised (red) phases of the outflow in ESO 484-036. These are calculated by subtracting the rotation of the disc to the \(\upsilon_{LOS}\) maps, excluding the centre region near the rotation axis, taking the median of the velocity offsets and then deprojecting it. Median velocity profiles are deprojected using \(\theta=30^{\circ}\) . To show the complete range of probable velocities, 16 th and 84 th percentile curves (solid and dashed grey curves, respectively) of the velocity offset profiles are deprojected by \(\theta_{max}=40^{\circ}\) and \(\theta_{min}=22^{\circ}\) , respectively. Grey band is the disc region. Given the better coverage of the ionised phase, the profiles extent up to 3 kpc in both sides of the disc. south present similar velocities compared to the cold phase at 1.5 kpc, but after 2 kpc, it goes at least 100 \(km\ s^{-1}\) higher (median profile).
figures.caption_zh: 图8：ESO 484-036流出中分子相（蓝色）和电离相（红色）的速度分布。通过从\(\upsilon_{LOS}\)图中减去盘旋转，排除旋转轴附近的中心区域，取速度偏移的中位数然后去投影计算得到。中位速度分布使用\(\theta=30^{\circ}\)去投影。为显示完整可能速度范围，速度偏移分布的第16和第84百分位曲线（分别为实线和虚线灰色曲线）分别由\(\theta_{max}=40^{\circ}\)和\(\theta_{min}=22^{\circ}\)去投影。灰色带为盘区域。鉴于电离相覆盖更好，分布延伸至盘两侧各3 kpc。南部在1.5 kpc处速度与冷相相似，但在2 kpc后，其速度至少高出100 \(km\ s^{-1}\)（中位分布）。

title: Gravitational-wave lensing beyond rays: a disordered-system approach
summary: We develop a framework to describe gravitational wave propagation through a stochastic distribution of weak gravitational lenses beyond the geometric optics limit. We model the lens distribution as a static random background field and formulate the problem in the language of quenched disorder, treating the disorder averaged density matrix as the fundamental object from which observables are computed. Using the Schwinger Keldysh formalism, we construct a path-integral representation of the averaged density matrix and derive its explicit form perturbatively for a suitable class of couplings. The result naturally separates into a quadratic exponential term, which governs the suppression of phase sensitive contributions in the averaged description, and a purely oscillatory contribution, which modifies coherent propagation through a disorder-induced correction to the propagation kernel. This provides a unified description of interference, diffraction, and statistical fluctuations of the lens distribution within a single framework. We also identify the physical scales controlling the onset of coherence loss and illustrate the formalism in the case of Gaussian wave packets. More generally, the derivation applies to any system described by the same class of actions, making the framework relevant beyond gravitational wave lensing to wave propagation in disordered media.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一个框架，用于描述引力波在弱引力透镜随机分布中的传播，超越了几何光学极限，统一描述了干涉、衍射和统计涨落效应。
AI.motivation: 研究引力波在随机分布的弱引力透镜中的传播问题，超越传统几何光学近似，考虑波动效应和统计涨落，为理解引力波在宇宙结构中的传播提供更完整的理论框架。
AI.method: 将透镜分布建模为静态随机背景场，采用淬火无序理论框架，使用Schwinger-Keldysh形式构建平均密度矩阵的路径积分表示，并针对特定耦合类型进行微扰展开。
AI.result: 得到平均密度矩阵的显式形式，自然分离为控制相位敏感贡献抑制的二次指数项和修正传播核的纯振荡贡献，识别了相干性损失发生的物理尺度，并在高斯波包情况下进行了具体说明。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为引力波透镜效应提供了统一描述，将干涉、衍射和统计涨落纳入单一理论体系，且方法具有普适性，可应用于其他波在无序介质中传播的系统。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为引力波透镜，属于广义的透镜研究，与用户Zotero画像中的'lensing'和'lens'关键词匹配。然而，用户的核心兴趣是强引力透镜，特别是星系-星系强透镜，以及高红移星系动力学、运动学、偏振和多相气体。该论文聚焦于引力波在弱透镜随机分布中的传播理论，采用淬火无序和路径积分方法，与用户的主要研究领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系）在科学问题、方法和数据上均无直接关联。作者列表中无用户核心作者。因此，虽然存在泛关键词匹配，但实质相关性较低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。仅泛关键词'lensing'匹配，但具体方向（引力波透镜 vs. 强引力透镜）差异大。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。理论框架（淬火无序、路径积分）与用户常用的观测和模拟方法不同。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。论文提出了引力波透镜的新理论框架，但创新点不在用户主要兴趣领域内。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题（引力波透镜）与用户核心兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系）偏离较大，且不涉及用户优先关注的高红移星系动力学、运动学、偏振或多相气体。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们建立了一个框架，用于描述引力波在弱引力透镜随机分布中的传播，超越了几何光学极限。我们将透镜分布建模为静态随机背景场，并以淬火无序的语言表述问题，将无序平均后的密度矩阵视为计算可观测量所依据的基本对象。利用Schwinger-Keldysh形式论，我们构建了平均密度矩阵的路径积分表示，并针对一类合适的耦合推导出其显式微扰形式。结果自然分解为一个二次指数项（控制平均描述中相位敏感贡献的抑制）和一个纯振荡项（通过无序诱导的传播核修正来改变相干传播）。这为干涉、衍射和透镜分布的统计涨落提供了单一框架内的统一描述。我们还识别了控制相干性丧失起始的物理尺度，并以高斯波包为例说明了该形式论。更一般地，该推导适用于任何由相同作用量类描述的系统，因此该框架不仅适用于引力波透镜效应，还可推广至波在无序介质中传播的问题。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该框架为引力波透镜效应提供了统一描述，将干涉、衍射和统计涨落纳入单一理论体系，且方法具有普适性，可应用于其他波在无序介质中传播的系统。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Loop expansion of the time evolution operator.
figures.caption_zh: Figure 1 : 时间演化算符的圈展开。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Diagrammatic description of the dressed disorder correlator
figures.caption_zh: Figure 2 : 着装无序关联子的图解描述。

title: Could the high-mass black holes from gravitational-wave observations be explained by lensing?
summary: The high-mass ($M \gtrsim 30 M_\odot$) black holes (BHs) from the gravitational-wave (GW) observations of LIGO and Virgo came as a surprise to many astronomers. While the collapse of metal-poor massive stars could produce such BHs, gravitational lensing has been invoked to explain their high masses. Broadhurst, Diego, and Smoot (henceforth BDS) argued that the mass distribution of BHs in coalescing binaries is very similar to that of the galactic BHs, and the inferred high masses are the result of neglecting the lensing magnification. They also proposed a redshift distribution of binary BH (BBH) mergers to explain the observed LIGO-Virgo mass distribution. We ask whether such a model is consistent with different aspects of the GW observations: 1) the observed number of BBH mergers, 2) the distribution of their redshifted total mass and apparent luminosity distance, 3) the non-detection of strongly lensed events, and 4) the non-observation of the stochastic GW background. By simulating lensed BBH mergers with the BDS model and comparing them with observations, we conclude that no choice of BDS model parameters is consistent with all aspects of the observations. Lensing magnification is not a viable explanation for the high-mass BHs discovered by LIGO and Virgo.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过模拟引力透镜效应下的双黑洞合并事件，检验了BDS模型能否解释LIGO-Virgo观测到的高质量黑洞，发现该模型与多个观测方面不一致，否定了透镜放大是高质量黑洞成因的解释。
AI.motivation: LIGO和Virgo观测到的高质量黑洞（M≳30M⊙）让天文学家感到意外。虽然贫金属大质量恒星坍缩可以产生这样的黑洞，但引力透镜效应被提出作为解释其高质量的原因。BDS等人认为双黑洞合并的质量分布与银河系黑洞相似，观测到的高质量是由于忽略了透镜放大效应。本研究旨在检验BDS模型是否与引力波观测的多个方面一致。
AI.method: 通过模拟BDS模型下的透镜双黑洞合并事件，并与观测数据对比，检验模型在四个方面的符合程度：1)观测到的双黑洞合并数量；2)红移总质量和视光度距离分布；3)未探测到强透镜事件；4)未观测到随机引力波背景。
AI.result: 研究发现，无论选择何种BDS模型参数，都无法同时与所有观测方面保持一致。透镜放大效应不能合理解释LIGO和Virgo发现的高质量黑洞。
AI.conclusion: 引力透镜放大不是LIGO和Virgo观测到的高质量黑洞的可行解释。BDS模型与多个引力波观测方面存在矛盾，否定了透镜效应作为高质量黑洞成因的可能性。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题是引力透镜效应对引力波观测到的黑洞质量的影响，属于引力透镜的交叉应用，但并非用户核心关注的星系-星系强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或高红移多相气体。用户画像中虽有'lensing'关键词，但论文主要讨论引力波和黑洞质量，与用户主要研究领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系）关联较弱。方法上未涉及用户常用的高分辨率光谱或干涉成像技术。作者与用户核心作者无重叠。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文涉及引力透镜，但聚焦于引力波事件，而非用户核心的星系-星系强引力透镜或高红移星系研究。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。方法为模拟和统计比较，非用户常用的高分辨率光谱、干涉成像或动力学建模。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。作者不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。论文检验了透镜放大解释黑洞质量的模型，有一定新颖性，但与用户主要兴趣方向偏离。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主要讨论引力波和黑洞质量，与用户核心的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等方向关联弱。

artifacts.abstract_zh: The high-mass ($M \gtrsim 30 M_\odot$) black holes (BHs) from the gravitational-wave (GW) observations of LIGO and Virgo came as a surprise to many astronomers. While the collapse of metal-poor massive stars could produce such BHs, gravitational lensing has been invoked to explain their high masses. Broadhurst, Diego, and Smoot (henceforth BDS) argued that the mass distribution of BHs in coalescing binaries is very similar to that of the galactic BHs, and the inferred high masses are the result of neglecting the lensing magnification. They also proposed a redshift distribution of binary BH (BBH) mergers to explain the observed LIGO-Virgo mass distribution. We ask whether such a model is consistent with different aspects of the GW observations: 1) the observed number of BBH mergers, 2) the distribution of their redshifted total mass and apparent luminosity distance, 3) the non-detection of strongly lensed events, and 4) the non-observation of the stochastic GW background. By simulating lensed BBH mergers with the BDS model and comparing them with observations, we conclude that no choice of BDS model parameters is consistent with all aspects of the observations. Lensing magnification is not a viable explanation for the high-mass BHs discovered by LIGO and Virgo.
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 引力透镜放大不是LIGO和Virgo观测到的高质量黑洞的可行解释。BDS模型与多个引力波观测方面存在矛盾，否定了透镜效应作为高质量黑洞成因的可能性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Dotted-dashed lines show the BDS merger rate \(R(z)\) for different values of the model parameters \(A_{1}\) in units of \({yr}^{-1}\,{Gpc}^{-3}\) and \(t_{h}\) in units of \({Gyr}\) (shown in legends). In contrast, the shaded band shows the merger rates predicted by various population synthesis models in the literature. The black curve corresponds to the same obtained from the star formation model of Madau and Dickinson ( 2014 ) that is scaled with the local merger rate inferred from LVK observations.

Figure 2: The expected number of detectable GW events \(\Lambda\) as a function of BDS model parameters \(A_{1}\) and \(t_{h}\) . We draw contours of \(\Lambda=60\) and 115 (number of GW detections in O1-O2-O3, including Poisson uncertainties; see text and Appendix A for more details). A large region of parameter space is inconsistent with this constraint.

Figure 3: The expected percent of detectable strongly lensed pairs as a function of \(A_{1}\) and \(t_{h}\) . The \(3\sigma\) upper bound on the observed strong lensing fraction is \(\sim 6.3\%\) (see Appendix D ). The region with a larger fraction than this bound is inconsistent with the data.

Figure 4: The posterior distribution of \(A_{1},t_{h}\) estimated from the consistency of the predicted distribution of the redshifted total mass and apparent luminosity distance with the corresponding posteriors of the observed events. The \(3\sigma\) lower/upper bounds are marked by vertical dashed lines.

Figure 5: The SGWB SNR as a function of \(A_{1}\) and \(t_{h}\) . We draw contours of SNR of 2 and 3 (which correspond to a \(2\sigma\) and \(3\sigma\) detection of SGWB, respectively). The parameter space above an SNR of 3 can be rejected because of the non-detection of SGWB in current observations.

Figure 6: Viable regions of the BDS model parameter space under various criteria are colored: The yellow region is consistent with the total number of detected GW events (figure 1 ), the green region is consistent with the observed redshifted total mass and apparent luminosity distance distribution (figure 4 ), the pink region is consistent with the non-detection of SGWB (figure 5 ). The blue region is consistent with the observed upper limit on the strong lensing fraction (figure 3 ). No point in the parameter space is consistent with all the four observables simultaneously.

Figure 7: The posterior on the Poisson mean of the distribution of the number of detectable events. The bounds \(\Lambda\sim 60\) and \(\Lambda\sim 115\) enclose the \(3\sigma\) bounds on the Poisson mean \(\Lambda\) .

Figure 8: The accumulated SNR of the SGWB through O1, O2 and O3 observing runs for \(A_{1}=30000\,{yr}^{-1}\,{Gpc}^{-3}\) and \(t_{h}=1.25\,{Gyr}\) . The SNR exceeds the threshold of 2 in the O3a run, which, when combined with the non-detection of SGWB, rules out this choice of BDS model parameters.

title: An Improved Fit for Linear Halo Bias at High Redshift
comment: 6 pages + references, 3 figures, Fig. 3 and Eq. 8 are the main results. To be submitted to PRL, comments are welcome
summary: High- to ultrahigh-redshift clustering of halos provides a powerful tool to understand cosmology and galaxy formation. However, theoretical predictions are not firmly established in the first billion years, where current and upcoming surveys are beginning to reach percent-level precision. Here we measure dark matter halo biases at $z=6$ - 19 from simulation data, and find they are $\sim$ 3 - 4$\%$ higher than canonical results calibrated at low $z$. We provide an updated linear-bias fit at these early times, reducing the mean systematic offset to $< 1\%$. These results will enable robust interpretation of early-Universe galaxy clustering from JWST, Roman, and intensity-mapping surveys.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过模拟数据测量了z=6-19时期暗物质晕的偏差，发现比传统低红移校准结果高3-4%，提供了早期宇宙的更新线性偏差拟合，将系统偏移降至<1%。
AI.motivation: 高到超高红移的晕聚类是理解宇宙学和星系形成的有力工具，但在宇宙最初十亿年内，理论预测尚未牢固建立，而当前和即将进行的巡天已达到百分之一精度水平。
AI.method: 使用模拟数据测量z=6-19时期的暗物质晕偏差，并与传统低红移校准结果进行比较。
AI.result: 发现暗物质晕偏差比传统低红移校准结果高约3-4%，提供了早期宇宙的更新线性偏差拟合，将平均系统偏移降低到<1%。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果将为JWST、Roman望远镜和强度映射巡天对早期宇宙星系聚类的稳健解释提供支持。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要研究高红移暗物质晕的线性偏差，属于宇宙学大尺度结构领域，与用户的核心兴趣——强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等——没有直接关联。虽然涉及高红移和JWST，但主题和方法均偏离用户的主要研究方向。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低：论文主题为暗物质晕偏差和宇宙学，用户主要兴趣为强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、尘埃、致密气体等，仅在高红移和JWST上有泛泛重叠。
recommendation.method_fit: 低：使用N体模拟测量晕偏差，用户常用方法为引力透镜建模、积分场光谱、分子气体观测等，方法不匹配。
recommendation.author_fit: 无：作者Kuan Wang、Julian B. Muñoz、L. Y. Aaron Yung均不在用户的核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中：提供了高红移晕偏差的改进拟合，对宇宙学有一定价值，但非用户关注的前沿。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文属于纯宇宙学/大尺度结构，与用户核心的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等主题无关，且无核心作者参与。

artifacts.abstract_zh: High- to ultrahigh-redshift clustering of halos provides a powerful tool to understand cosmology and galaxy formation. However, theoretical predictions are not firmly established in the first billion years, where current and upcoming surveys are beginning to reach percent-level precision. Here we measure dark matter halo biases at $z=6$ - 19 from simulation data, and find they are $\sim$ 3 - 4$\%$ higher than canonical results calibrated at low $z$. We provide an updated linear-bias fit at these early times, reducing the mean systematic offset to $< 1\%$. These results will enable robust interpretation of early-Universe galaxy clustering from JWST, Roman, and intensity-mapping surveys.
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 这些结果将为JWST、Roman望远镜和强度映射巡天对早期宇宙星系聚类的稳健解释提供支持。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Simulation box properties and analysis ranges. For each simulation box, we list the particle mass \(m_{ptcl}\) , the redshift range that we analyze, the lower bounds of mass \(\log_{10}M_{low}\) for sample selection, and the scale range \(\log_{10}r\) used in the clustering measurements.

Figure 1: Two representative examples of our correlation function measurements and halo bias determination. The top panels show the halo–matter cross-correlation function and the matter auto-correlation function plotted as \(r^{2}\xi(r)\) . The bottom panels show the corresponding scale-dependent halo bias \(b_{h}(r)\) . The error bars show jackknife uncertainties. The vertical shaded regions indicate the scales used for fitting Equation 2 , whereas the horizontal dotted lines and shaded regions show the best-fits and uncertainties of the linear bias \(b_{lin}\) .

Figure 2: Measured halo bias–peak height relation and comparison to previous fits. The error bars show the measured halo bias against the effective peak height for each sample, with jackknife error, and are color coded by redshift. The different model fits, including our updated fit, are shown in curves of different colors and line styles, as labeled in the figure. The T10 fit was calibrated at \(z\sim 0\) - 2.5 for \(-0.4\lesssim\log_{10}\nu_{eff}\lesssim 0.55\) .

Figure 3: Comparison between measurements and fits. Same as Figure 2 , but in terms of fractional deviations from the T10 predictions. The \(\chi^{2}\) values in the figure correspond to our updated fit and the original T10 fit, respectively. The arrows on the right summarize representative claimed measurements and forecasts of the fractional uncertainty in galaxy bias at high redshift from various facilities: a measurement at \(z\sim 8.5\) from Ref. [ 12 , JWST] , a measurement at \(z\sim 5.9\) from Ref. [ 19 , HSC] , and a forecast at \(z\sim 11\) from Ref. [ 37 , Roman] .
